3119990.name: Eclipsi
3119990.description:
Embark on an adrenaline-fueled space adventure within tightly curated battlegrounds. Dive into the heart of action with our 3D space shooter, offering thrilling single and multiplayer showdowns from 1v1 to 5v5. Strategize, dominate, and experience the ultimate intensity with our innovative ranking and scoring system – all within the confines of a dynamic, focused game space!

Experience the ultimate 3D space shooter adventure with our second level featuring two lush, expansive planets. Explore vibrant landscapes to collect ores, achieving victory through resource mastery, base destruction, or strategic base capture. Engage in thrilling flight simulation and combat both in space and through the planet's atmosphere, with intense battles from 1v1 to 5v5 in single and multiplayer modes. Dominate the cosmos with our dynamic ranking and scoring system!

Multiplayer will follow later on after the game's release. Single player will be released first
3119990.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
